name: Florentine Style
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and cook the spinach in a small amount of water. Drain well, squeezing out excess moisture with your hands when cool enough.
2. Chop the spinach coarsely.
3. In a large pan, melt butter over medium heat in olive oil. Add the spinach and fry lightly until wilted.
4. Season with salt, pepper, and nutmeg.
5. Sprinkle flour into the pan and stir to combine.
6. Gradually add warm milk while stirring constantly to avoid lumps. Cook for a few minutes until the sauce thickens slightly.
7. Transfer the spinach mixture to a baking dish and keep warm in the oven.
8. Prepare your choice of meat or fish (such as fried fish, veal cutlets, sliced steak, pork cutlets, or chicken cutlets).
9. When ready, top the spinach with the cooked meat and serve hot.
